My team from Columbia was selected as a winner to the [15th Annual Academic Student Competition](https://cdn.wildapricot.com/82393/resources/Documents/2026%20Student%20Competition/The%20IAQF%20Announces%20the%20Winners%20of%20the%20Fifteenth%20Annual%20IAQF%20Academic%20Affiliate%20Membership%20Student%20Competition%202026.pdf?version=1778509699000&&Signature=FiKaqN5yeGOC-lbPV-VAXQK5i~KEpILhV833bBm8JAvdP5iYALq8z4KDYEhNZ8fMFQNpE8YNtVYp1Qjl-XLrODubdb2LxafsB6gAKMPaC2Ziyw6kPO1jhhJFDBzez4LtxNHXJAPxPBy~~aIddQOFuJumwKaEiudAsNYJWoaQ-dx6Yka3PVslEBamS-ndpW70-UIZ5vrKz83ID0zBunPo2E1Dum4wgPhGhh0LjdwT9qgsJQviNAnOC1-SKHpfUF9300Gwx0-KOOFjrKouunnduuN2ffOuQlfbD7dKNktKpmky6VHCYuPoq56-5T3vh-cX1S6bJzbnjNo72e4GGAnefw__&Key-Pair-Id=K27MGQSHTHAGGF), hosted by the [International Association for Quantitative Finance](iaqf.org).
